title: Vanilla Thirst Bar
description:
You can drink from a water source, cauldron or with vanilla items. 
Items have food/drink info on tooltip.
You can see your food/thirst saturation on ur HUD with an Appleskin-like hud.
Solo and multiplayer.
body:
Version MC 1.21.11 only, fabric only.

# A vanilla-like thirst bar

Keep your thirst high by drinking from different sources while maintaining vanilla logic. 
Potions, food (see tooltip).... cauldron, watersource (dont forget to Sneak and right click with empty hand)

## Visible Saturation

Just like hunger, thirst has a saturation point depending on the source, and this is fully visible (hunger too) on your HUD. 

## Icons on Tooltip

You can easily see the attributes associated with items by hovering over them, indicating the hunger/thirst gains.

## thirst effect

less than 3 water drop give you mining fatigue.
No water drop gives you damage over time (2 times the hunger damages) and cyclically apply nausea and obscurity

### Water bottle

Can now be stacked by 8.

### customizable

You can change values as you wish in the config file Config/Thirst/Dehydration if the default one doesn't suit you
